verses.text: Offer no blemished beast to the LORD. Without blemish. God deserves the best.
The idolater, on sure proof, shall be stoned. Idolatry. Apostasy is judged.
The idolater, on sure proof, shall be stoned. Idolatry. Apostasy is judged.
The idolater, on sure proof, shall be stoned. Idolatry. Apostasy is judged.
The idolater, on sure proof, shall be stoned. Idolatry. Apostasy is judged.
Two or three witnesses are needed; their hand falls first. Witnesses. Justice guards life.
Two or three witnesses are needed; their hand falls first. Witnesses. Justice guards life.
Hard cases go to the priests and the judge. The court. God provides for judgment.
Hard cases go to the priests and the judge. The court. God provides for judgment.
Heed their sentence; the presumptuous shall die. Submit. Order is upheld.
Heed their sentence; the presumptuous shall die. Submit. Order is upheld.
Heed their sentence; the presumptuous shall die. Submit. Order is upheld.
Heed their sentence; the presumptuous shall die. Submit. Order is upheld.
A king must not multiply horses, wives, or gold. The king. Even kings are bounded.
A king must not multiply horses, wives, or gold. The king. Even kings are bounded.
A king must not multiply horses, wives, or gold. The king. Even kings are bounded.
A king must not multiply horses, wives, or gold. The king. Even kings are bounded.
He shall write and read the law all his days. The law. The king submits to God's word.
He shall write and read the law all his days. The law. The king submits to God's word.
